title: parosela johnsonii var. saundersii
intro: Parosela johnsonii var. saundersii, also known as Saussurea costus, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly referred to as the costus root or kuth. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Parosela johnsonii var. saundersii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
